prevalence.source: ESC syncope guidelines; European cohort data

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to injuries and hospitalizations
burden.mortalityRate: Low overall; higher when cardiac causes

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: History and exam, orthostatic BP, ECG; ambulatory monitoring or tilt testing when indicated

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening; evaluated in emergency/primary care
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with syncope units and guideline pathways

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Access to ambulatory ECG monitoring and syncope units
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Treat underlying cause; pacemaker for conduction disease; targeted therapy for reflex syncope
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High healthcare utilization and recurrent cases
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: ESC guideline adherence and specialized syncope clinics
